title: Preserve Order of Input and Output Port Declarations

features.name: escaped_identifier_array_ports
features.description: Code should include a module with multiple output ports using backslash-escaped names with unpacked array indices
features.snippet: module top(output [15:0] yankee, output \november[0], output \november[1], output \alfa[0], output \alfa[1]); endmodule

features.name: lexical_numeric_index_sorting
features.description: Code should include port array indices where lexical sorting causes 10 to sort before 2 (e.g., alfa[10] before alfa[2])
